agent_types.name: Human Individual
agent_types.description: A single human actor responsible for initiating a decision.

agent_types.name: Human Collective
agent_types.description: A group of human actors jointly responsible for a decision.

agent_types.name: Institutional Authority
agent_types.description: A formal organization or institutional body responsible for initiating or approving a decision.

agent_types.name: Artificial Intelligence System
agent_types.description: A software system capable of generating decisions autonomously or semi-autonomously.

agent_types.name: Autonomous Machine
agent_types.description: A physical system such as a robot, drone, or automated infrastructure executing decisions.

agent_types.name: Hybrid Agent
agent_types.description: A combination of human and artificial systems jointly producing a decision.

agent_types.name: Distributed System
agent_types.description: A network of interacting systems collectively generating operational events.
